description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden desk with a natural light brown finish, featuring a rectangular work surface and a raised hutch on the back. The hutch includes three vertical cubby compartments on the right side, ideal for organizing documents or small items, and an open shelf space above the main work area. Below the right side of the desk is a small cabinet with a black handle, providing enclosed storage. The desk stands on two solid side panels, offering stability and a clean, modern look. The overall design is functional and compact, suitable for both work and study environments.
description: A light brown wooden desk with a raised hutch, cubby compartments, and a small cabinet for storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main work surface, three vertical cubbies, open shelf, and cabinet with handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the vertical structure of the hutch and cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel of the hutch and the open space beneath the work surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid side panel and the profile of the hutch and cabinet.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features the open work surface, cubby compartments, and cabinet with handle, indicating this is the front; the back is a plain panel.
attribute_usage_context: writing desk or compact computer workstation
